title: Destiny 128x
description: A modern themed realistic texture pack that comes in 4 different resolutions, all the way up to 1024x.
body: Destiny is a highly detailed, realistic Minecraft resource pack that makes your world feel more alive and immersive, without losing the original vibe of the game. On the Free 128x version you get all the textures thats in the Destiny higher resolution packs (3000+ individual texture files) but in the lowest resolution that the pack comes in. 128px. The pack is split into 3 modular parts. (Free version contains all of them in the same file) so you can combine them however you like for better performance and flexibility: - Destiny – All the main blocks you see in the overworld (grass, dirt, stone, etc.) - Destiny SURPLUS – Underground, Nether, End, redstone stuff, and other uncommon blocks - Destiny ITEMS – Items You can mix different resolutions between modules if needed, and there’s no specific order you have to follow, though packs like ITEMS or SURPLUS usually go on top in your resource pack list. The pack supports both Optifine and Iris, and you’ll need a shader pack that supports PBR and POM to see it the way it’s meant to look. I personally recommend Kappa Shaders, since that’s what I use during development, everything is tuned around it. All the images shown are taken with Kappa Shaders using the Destiny 1024x version. [![ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b2dcaee46c3e6be1196566769dc3886f00729a_0.webp)](https://www.patreon.com/WilloCreations)
